Parking Lot.Body: You are currently in the parking lot in front of your office building! You are opening up for the day and are ready to start your work. You have a few things to do before you can start working. Walk towards the Office!

Basement.Body: You are at the basemnet where they keep the key to the office. You're having some foggy memory today so you can't remeber what lock has the correct key! Which will you pick?

Black Key Lock.Body: You open the key lock but it's not here! Dang, try the other one...

Grey Key Lock.Body: Nice! You have the key to the office! Let's walk in and get set up for the day!

Stairs.Body: You think to yourself, why are there so many stairs here...

Secret Door.Body: Woah! You found a secret door where the maintenance workers keep their tools. They have a cute dog here, that you can pet!

Choices.Text: Pet Ralphie and Go Back Up

Hallway.Body: You're walking through the hallway and you see a sign that says 'Main Office' and another sign that says 'Community Computer'. Lets check out the Community Computer first since it takes longer!

Community Computer.Body: Woah, there's a password on the computer and your memory is a bit foggy... Maybe try looking for the password in the office?

Dr. W's Office.Body: You look around the office and you notice a small note under the desk...

Computer.Body: You got the password now log on! Don't forget to open the front door as well!

Dr. R's Office.Body: You look around the office, but you can't find a password anywhere. Maybe it's in the other office?

Unlock Front Door.Body: You unlocked the front door and you're done setting up for the day! Walk back to the main office and take a seat!

Main Office.Body: You're in the main office and you see two other offices...

Sit Down!.Body: You sat down and you're done! Another successful opening shift, good job!
